{{Infobox character
| name = Prince Veshran
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
| name = Prince Veshran
| aliases = Veshran
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = Prince of Karosha, Karoshan prince
| affiliations = Karosha
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

''See also: [[Prince Veshran Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Prince Veshran is a member of the [[Karoshan]] royal family and serves as the twin brother to [[the Queen]]. Physically, he is a tall individual characterized by bronze skin and long, bright hair-cables that possess a golden hue. He is known for an intense and sometimes intimidating presence, often using his stature to loom over others or expressing strong emotions through exaggerated facial expressions. In the realm of [[Karoshan]] politics, Veshran is a vocal figure who critiques his sister's leadership, specifically warning her that her selflessness and lack of demands could cause her people to lose faith in her. He holds strong views on conflict and survival, believing that showing mercy to a defenseless opponent is an act of foolishness. His interactions with others involve high tension, ranging from displays of outrage regarding political alliances to moments of visible physical agitation when faced with opposition.}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Prince Veshran is a bronze-skinned [[Karoshan]] male with bright, golden hair-cables. As the twin brother of Shyrax, he serves as a political representative in [[the Queen]]'s court and governs a colony located within [[Alliance space]]. Known for being both earnest and strict, he has maintained his independence from [[Felrex]] through strategic alliances and repositioning. Veshran commands a fleet and leads a [[Karoshan legion]], eventually providing people for the crew to protect during their retreat.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Veshran is Shyrax's twin brother and governs a colony in [[Alliance space]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19">''The Pilot'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Veshran has remained independent from [[Felrex]] through repositioning and alliances.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Prince Veshran]] of [[Karosha]] is a bronze-skinned man with golden hair-cables.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Prince Veshran]] is a Prince of [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Prince Veshran]] is described as strict but earnest.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c21">''The Pilot'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Prince Veshran]] has thick, bronze skin and long hair-cables that shine brightly.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Prince Veshran]] serves as the political representative in the court for [[the Queen]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Veshran is the twin brother of Shyrax.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Veshran has a fleet.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Veshran leads a [[Karoshan legion]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Veshran has people that the crew needed to cover the retreat of.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Veshran is a [[Karoshan]] prince.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Veshran is a male [[Karoshan]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|"Sister," said Prince Veshran of Karosha.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“There was another gathering, Sister,” Prince Veshran said.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
